modules.name: ComplianceDashboardPage
modules.description: Executive compliance overview across all frameworks

modules.name: FrameworksPage
modules.description: Manage compliance frameworks and view per-framework progress

modules.name: ControlsPage
modules.description: Full controls register across all active frameworks

modules.name: EvidencePage
modules.description: Manage all compliance evidence files and links

modules.name: TasksPage
modules.description: Compliance tasks and remediation action tracking

modules.name: AuditLogPage
modules.description: Immutable audit trail of all compliance-related actions

events.name: control:status_changed
events.description: Notify compliance manager when control status changes

events.name: evidence:expired
events.description: Notify control owner when evidence expires

events.name: task:overdue
events.description: Notify assignee when task becomes overdue

flows.name: Import Framework Controls
steps: Show FrameworkImportModal with template preview (all controls in the framework)
User reviews and deselects any N/A controls
On confirm: bulk create ComplianceControl records
Notify compliance manager to begin assigning owners

flows.name: Review Control
flows.trigger: Owner opens control and clicks Log Review
steps: Show ReviewControlModal with current status pre-filled
User updates status, adds notes, sets next_review_date

flows.name: Upload Evidence
flows.trigger: User uploads file or adds link
steps: Upload file to S3 (if file type)
Create ComplianceEvidence record with file_url and metadata
If evidence satisfies control requirement → suggest updating control status to compliant

computed_fields.name: evidence_count
computed_fields.formula: COUNT(compliance_evidence) WHERE control_id = controls.id AND deleted_at IS NULL

computed_fields.name: compliant_pct
computed_fields.formula: COUNT(controls WHERE status='compliant') / COUNT(controls WHERE status != 'not_applicable') * 100

computed_fields.name: is_expired
computed_fields.formula: expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < CURRENT_DATE

computed_fields.name: is_overdue
computed_fields.formula: next_review_date IS NOT NULL AND next_review_date < CURRENT_DATE AND status != 'compliant'

domain_rules: Each control belongs to exactly one framework
Evidence is soft-deleted; deletion requires confirmation and creates an audit log entry
Audit log entries are immutable: no UPDATE or DELETE allowed on compliance_audit_logs
Non-compliant controls require a remediation_plan before saving if severity is high or critical
Evidence expiry reminders sent 30 days and 7 days before expiry
Control review reminders sent 14 days before next_review_date
Framework import uses seed data for standard frameworks (ISO27001, SOC2, GDPR, etc.)
Recurring compliance tasks auto-regenerate recurrence_days after completion
generation_rules: Framework control templates stored as seed data files in /data directory; imported on demand
Audit log writes are fire-and-forget via middleware hooks; never block main request
S3 evidence files use presigned URLs with 1-hour expiry for secure access
Evidence expiry cron job runs daily at 8am to send reminders and update is_expired flags
Compliance score recalculated on every control status change; cached in Redis for 5 minutes
Bulk control import runs in background job; user notified via websocket on completion
AuditLog table has no soft delete; use partitioning by created_at year for large datasets
Control review_frequency_days defaults to 365 (annual) for new frameworks

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
